hooks.command: node -e "const c=[];process.stdin.on('data',d=>c.push(d));process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(c.join(''));const fp=(i.tool_input&&i.tool_input.file_path)||'';if(/src\/.*\.tsx?$|client\/src\/.*\.tsx?$/.test(fp)){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PostToolUse',additionalContext:'You just modified '+fp+'. If this change adds, removes, or modifies a user-facing feature, update README.md to reflect it.'}}));}});"
